root_cause: CI --cov-fail-under=50 allowed coverage to drop from 98% to 51% without failing; documented 90% target was not enforced
fix_summary: Changed --cov-fail-under=50 to --cov-fail-under=90 in ci.yml; branches from codex/issue-101 which fixes indicators.py from 87% to 100%
dependency: codex/issue-101 (indicators.py 87%→100% must be merged first or this PR stacks on top)
